cv.name: Dorothy Williams
cv.summary: Dedicated and reliable worker with 6 years of customer-facing retail experience. Strong communication skills and bilingual capability. Looking for stable full-time employment with benefits to support my family.

experience.title: Cashier / Sales Associate
bullets: Handle 100+ customer transactions daily with 99.5% accuracy
Train new hires on POS system and store procedures
Maintain organized inventory displays and restocking schedules
Resolve customer complaints and process returns

experience.title: Crew Member / Shift Lead
bullets: Promoted to shift lead within 8 months
Supervised team of 5 during evening shifts
Managed food safety compliance and daily checklists
Handled cash register and nightly reconciliation

goals: Find full-time job with health benefits
Get childcare assistance for 4-year-old
Apply for Section 8 housing
Earn CNA certification for healthcare career
barriers: No vehicle — depends on bus routes
Needs affordable childcare before taking full-time work
Limited internet access (phone only)
Benefits cliff fear — losing Medicaid if income rises

cv.name: Marcus Johnson
cv.summary: Army veteran with 6 years of military logistics experience and 2 years of civilian warehouse operations. Strong leadership, discipline, and problem-solving skills. Seeking higher-wage career in logistics management or IT to provide better for my son.

experience.title: Warehouse Associate
bullets: Process 200+ packages per shift with 99.8% accuracy rate
Operate forklift and pallet jack in 150,000 sq ft facility
Train new associates on safety protocols and pick/pack procedures
Maintain daily productivity above 110% of target

experience.title: Supply Sergeant (E-5)
bullets: Managed $2.4M inventory of parts and equipment for aviation battalion
Led team of 8 soldiers in supply chain operations
Implemented barcode tracking system reducing loss by 15%
Received Army Commendation Medal for logistics excellence
SECRET security clearance (active)

education.degree: Associate of Applied Science — Logistics (In Progress)

goals: Transition from warehouse labor to logistics management ($50K+)
Complete Associate degree at Trenholm State
Earn CompTIA A+ certification for IT backup plan
Use GI Bill benefits effectively
barriers: Current salary barely covers rent + childcare
Night shifts conflict with class schedule
Limited civilian network for professional referrals
VA benefits navigation is confusing

cv.name: Maria Reyes
cv.summary: Compassionate CNA with 3 years of patient care experience in long-term care facilities. Bilingual English/Spanish. Pursuing LPN licensure to advance healthcare career and increase family income. CPR and First Aid certified.

experience.title: Certified Nursing Assistant (CNA)
bullets: Provide daily care for 12-15 elderly residents including bathing, feeding, and mobility assistance
Monitor and document vital signs, intake/output, and behavioral changes
Serve as Spanish interpreter for Hispanic patients and families
Received Employee of the Month recognition twice

experience.title: Patient Care Technician (PRN)
bullets: Assisted nurses on medical-surgical floor with patient care
Performed phlebotomy draws and EKG readings
Maintained sterile environment and infection control protocols

goals: Complete LPN bridge program at Trenholm State
Increase income from $15/hr CNA to $22/hr LPN
Get WIC benefits renewed for 2-year-old
Find affordable childcare near West Montgomery
barriers: LPN program requires GED — need to study and pass
One car shared with husband who works opposite shift
WIC recertification paperwork is confusing
English medical vocabulary still developing

cv.name: James Carter
cv.summary: Retired city maintenance worker with 30 years of service. Vietnam-era veteran. Looking for part-time work to supplement Social Security and stay active. Experienced in facilities maintenance, groundskeeping, and basic electrical work.

experience.title: Senior Maintenance Worker
bullets: Maintained city parks, recreation centers, and public buildings
Performed electrical, plumbing, and HVAC repairs
Supervised seasonal work crews of 4-6 workers
Operated heavy equipment including backhoe and mowers

goals: Find part-time maintenance work (15-20 hrs/week)
Apply for LIHEAP to reduce electric bills
Get help navigating Medicare Part D prescription costs
Find free transportation to VA clinic
barriers: No internet at home — needs in-person help
Limited mobility due to knee injury
Doesn't know about 211 helpline or available programs
Fixed income barely covers property tax + utilities

cv.name: Aisha Thompson
cv.summary: Recent graduate from Alabama State University with a Bachelor's in Business Administration. Completed internship in healthcare administration. Strong analytical skills, proficient in Excel and data analysis. Seeking entry-level management or analyst position in Montgomery.

experience.title: Administrative Intern
bullets: Analyzed patient scheduling data to identify bottlenecks, reducing wait times by 12%
Created weekly reports in Excel for department heads
Assisted with onboarding documentation for 15 new hires
Shadowed operations manager in budget planning meetings

experience.title: Student Worker — Front Desk
bullets: Managed event scheduling system for 20+ campus organizations
Handled student inquiries and facility reservations
Processed purchase orders and tracked departmental budget

goals: Land entry-level management or analyst role ($35K-$45K)
Build professional network in Montgomery
Earn Google Data Analytics Certificate
Move into own apartment within 6 months of employment
barriers: No professional experience beyond internship
Most analyst roles require 2+ years experience
Student loan payments start in 6 months
Limited professional network outside university
